title: jasminum promunturianum
intro: Jasminum promunturianum, also known as the night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and helping to manage menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Jasminum promunturianum can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or powder, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels.
